payload.subject: Team infrastructure complete — full technical relay

deliverables: Hub-and-spoke message bus (atomic seq, flock, routing enforcement)
Team role registry (heartbeat liveness, capability declarations)
End-to-end verification (all hooks fire, checkpoint validates clean)
key_insights: Mortality-aware design: save continuously, read on boot — instance death is the normal case
Hub-and-spoke over mesh: O(n) channels, coordinator sees everything, prevents CBP bypass
Rolling buffers (50 msgs, 30 events): enough history for recovery without state bloat
